transcript: This is how to look like a rich CEO, boyfriend, and a K-drama on top of New York City. If you want to get the best views of New York City during the day, you're going to have to go up to this place called The Egg. Even the experience of getting all the way up there, including this elevator with a little storyline on the panels is super interesting. And when you get to the top, you're going to get awesome views all around 360 of Manhattan. Don't look down down if you're scared of heights but there is a glass panel floor where you can take pictures and videos this is super iconic and a lot of my friends love these pictures that i took and here's my sister and i doing some k-pop dances let me know if you want to see the best view at nighttime and i'll create a video for that
